steps.title: Compare specimen types
steps.content: The first reference organism is a holotype, the exact specimen used for the original formal description. The next reference organism is a neotype, which serves as a reference but is not the originally described specimen.

steps.title: Signal the difference
steps.content: Choice B merely adds similar information. Choice C signals a concession, and Choice D signals an example. Since the second specimen type differs from the first, the remaining contrast transition fits. The answer is A.
